name: QA 1417
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1417



iostat2pcp exerciser



PCP_ARCHIVE_VERSION V3 variant, see 373 for the V2 variant.



Copyright (c) 2010 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py centos-stream9-container reproduce
